posts.author: MariaRH (Maria de Bofarull)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,
We are a corporation that uses the Managed Column in multiple boards since we need the information to travel to different places and we can’t always depend on mirror columns (due to their limit), we are running low on the 500 dropdown labels and while we have a lot that are unused, it seems like we can’t actually delete them in the Managed Column.
HELP!
